2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX
26 - 28 Jun 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 28
Date 27 June 2026
Time 15:20
Title Infringement - Free Practice 3 Deleted Lap Times
Description Infringement - Free Practice 3 Deleted Lap Times

Felix Holter Loïc Bacquelaine
Pedro Lamy Wilhelm Singer

 
 
2026 AUSTRIAN GRAND PRIX 
26 – 28 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 28 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  27 June 2026 
 
        Time  15:20 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 3 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 3 and 9. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time
